history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark, game-like interface screen shows a “LEVEL UP!” banner above a profile panel displaying level and progress information.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a rounded rectangular UI panel with a circular avatar on the left, the text “Lynxx” in the top-left area, and multiple labeled boxes showing level and experience progress.

Setting:
The image appears to be a digital interface on a dark background with a subtle gradient and neon-like accents; no real-world environment, time of day, or weather is visible.

Visual Details:
At the top center, the words “LEVEL UP!” appear in large yellow letters with small decorative diamond-like shapes on both sides. Inside the main panel, “Lynxx” appears in white, with “LEVEL PROGRESS” in smaller text beneath it. A small yellow-outlined badge with “#4” is displayed near the top area. In the center, a purple rounded box contains “LEVEL” and a large white “4.” To the right, a green rounded box contains “EXPERIENCE” and “18 / 250” in white. Below these, a long horizontal progress bar appears with a small purple segment on the left and a “7%” label at the right end. Near the bottom of the panel, three dark rounded statistic tiles read “MESSAGES” with “203,” “XP NEEDED” with “232,” and “NEXT LVL” with “5.” The background gradient behind the panel is deep purple to dark, and the panel uses thin, faint borders and layered dark tones.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Lynxx
#4
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
4
EXPERIENCE
18 / 250
7%
MESSAGES
203
XP NEEDED
232
NEXT LVL
5
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image is a stylized game UI screen announcing a level up. It shows a character/profile name and a progress summary including current level, experience toward the next level, and related counts.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
